data.title: Binance to Retire Auto-Invest Index-Linked Plan by November 2025
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the Auto-Invest Index-Linked Plan will be retired on 2025-11-27. This decision is part of Binance's strategy to focus on developing products that offer greater value to users. As part of this transition, users are encouraged to switch to the Convert Recurring Portfolio Plan to continue their investment journey.

Key dates have been outlined for this transition. Starting from 2025-09-25, new subscriptions to the Auto-Invest Index-Linked Plan will no longer be available. The final rebalancing event for existing plans is scheduled for 2025-10-31. Until 2025-11-27, users can continue to make recurring investments or edit their existing plans. After this date, all Auto-Invest Index-Linked Plans will be inaccessible, and any unredeemed plans will be automatically redeemed by the system. Additionally, the Auto-Invest entrance under the Earn Account will be removed.

To redeem Auto-Invest Index-Linked plans before the deadline, users should visit their Earn Account to redeem purchased assets in full. Once redeemed, these assets will be distributed to the user's Spot Account. For those wishing to continue automated investments, Binance suggests switching to the Convert Recurring Portfolio plans, which allow users to stay invested in preferred tokens through pre-set portfolios like the Top 10 Auto-Invest. These plans offer the convenience of automated recurring investments without the need for monthly rebalancing events. Any plans not redeemed by 2025-11-27 will be automatically redeemed, and users will no longer have access to their Index-Linked Plans through their Earn Accounts from that date onwards.

data.title: U.S. Department of Justice Arrests Teen Linked to Ransomware Group
data.description:
According to PANews, the U.S. Department of Justice has arrested a 19-year-old member of the Scattered Spider ransomware group. Court documents reveal that the individual, identified as Jubair, also known as Earth2Star, allegedly obtained approximately 920.16 BTC in ransom through ransomware attacks.

23pds, the Chief Information Security Officer at SlowMist Technology, stated on the X platform that the Scattered Spider network did not exploit zero-day vulnerabilities, use new malware, or target vulnerable external machines. Instead, they conducted basic reconnaissance using social media platforms like LinkedIn and investor websites to gather information about companies. They then called help desks to gain trust and execute their attacks.

data.title: Arthur Hayes received 796,000 ETHFI from investor allocation addresses, worth $1.297 million
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, Arthur Hayes received 796,383 ETHFI worth US$1.297 million from the investor allocation address 7 hours ago.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 4,600 USDT with a 0.40% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Sep 19, 2025, 02:14 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 4,600 USDT and is now trading at 4,598.109863 USDT, with a narrowed 0.40% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: An address deposited 9,000 ETH to Binance and sold it for a profit of $23.37 million
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, an address (0x395...500) deposited 9,000 ETH, worth $41.55 million, to Binance in the past 15 minutes. This address accumulated 32,356 ETH at an average price of $3,027 between June and August of this year. Since September 15th, a total of 15,010 ETH, worth approximately $68.8 million, has been transferred to exchanges. If all of this were sold, a profit of $23.37 million would be realized.

data.title: Justin Sun: Tron's decentralized perpetual contract platform SunPerp is now online
data.description: Justin Sun wrote on the X platform: "Decentralized perpetual contracts have a bright future on Tron. Tron is one of the main networks for USDT, and perpetual contracts are one of USDT's earliest application scenarios. Although it's a bit late, as the saying goes: the best time to plant a tree is ten years ago, and the second best time is now. SunPerp is finally here."

data.title: British Citizen Charged in Extensive Cybercrime Case Involving U.S. Entities
data.description: According to Foresight News, British citizen Thalha Jubair has been indicted for his involvement in over 120 cyber intrusions and extortion attacks affecting 47 U.S. entities. The total ransom paid by victims exceeds $115 million. The indictment alleges that 19-year-old Jubair collaborated with the cybercrime group Scattered Spider, using social engineering techniques to gain unauthorized access to networks, steal and encrypt information, and then demand ransom from victims. The group also targeted critical infrastructure companies and the U.S. court system. In July 2024, law enforcement successfully seized approximately $36 million in cryptocurrency during a server raid. Jubair faces multiple charges, including computer fraud, telecommunications fraud, and money laundering, with a maximum sentence of 95 years in prison.

data.title: Pendle multi-signature wallet transfers 1.2 million PENDLE tokens to Binance, valued at $6.44 million
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember's monitoring, 10 minutes ago, Pendle's multi-signature wallet (0x811...6ee1) transferred another 1.2 million PENDLEs worth $6.44 million to Binance.

data.description: Japan's 2-year government bond yield rose to 0.885%, the highest level since June 2008. (Jinshi)

data.title: A whale deposited $4 million in USDC with HyperLiquid to avoid liquidation of its BTC short position
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a whale deposited $4 million in USDC into HyperLiquid to prevent liquidation of its 20x BTC short position. Over the past 15 days, this whale has deposited a total of $15 million in USDC to prevent liquidation. Currently, this whale faces a floating loss of $12.45 million, but has profited $6.247 million through funding rates.

data.title: Arthur Hayes Receives Significant ETHFI Tokens
data.description:
According to PANews, blockchain analyst @ai_9684xtpa reported that Arthur Hayes received 796,000 ETHFI tokens, valued at $1.322 million, from an ether.fi investor distribution address seven hours ago.

Two addresses, 0x2f8...D699b and 0x392...0c637, collectively received 1.592 million tokens from the project address. However, only a portion was transferred to Hayes, leaving the ownership of the remaining tokens unclear. Currently, Hayes holds a total of 2.013 million ETHFI tokens, valued at $3.28 million, ranking among the top five on-chain assets.

data.title: In the past 24 hours, the entire network has liquidated $245 million, mainly short positions
data.description: Coinglass data shows that in the past 24 hours, the entire network has experienced a liquidation of US$245 million, of which long positions have been liquidated for US$85.4058 million and short positions have been liquidated for US$159 million.

data.title: Coinbase launches on-chain lending feature
data.description: Coinbase has officially launched an on-chain lending feature, allowing users to lend USDC (USDC) through the decentralized finance protocol Morpho and earn competitive yields. Currently, this feature offers an annualized yield of up to 10.8% (as of September 18th). This feature runs entirely on the Base network, with technical support provided by Morpho and Steakhouse Financial. After users deposit USDC, Coinbase will create a smart contract wallet connected to the Morpho protocol. Funds will be allocated to various lending markets through an on-chain treasury curated by Steakhouse Financial to optimize returns. User funds can be withdrawn at any time, with instant credit available, provided liquidity is available. Coinbase stated that this feature will be gradually expanded to users in the United States (excluding New York State), Bermuda, and other countries over the coming weeks.

data.title: A whale transferred 4,412 ETH to Binance, worth $20.24 million
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, a whale (0x7Ab...A3FE) who made over $12 million in profit on Blast redeemed the ETH deposited in StakeStone and AO Protocol a year ago early this morning, and transferred 4,412 ETH (worth $20.24 million) to Binance.

data.title: Yesterday, FBTC saw a net inflow of $97.4 million, while ARKB saw a net inflow of $25 million.
data.description: According to Farside monitoring, FBTC had a net inflow of US$97.4 million, ARKB had a net inflow of US$25 million, Grayscale BTC had a net inflow of US$10.9 million, and HODL had a net inflow of US$6.6 million yesterday.

data.title: Grayscale Launches New ETF Under Revised Name
data.description:
According to PANews, Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas announced on the X platform that Grayscale, in collaboration with CoinDesk, has introduced the 'Grayscale CoinDesk Crypto 5 ETF.' This fund is a rebranded version of the Grayscale Digital Large Cap Fund (GDLC) and is set to begin trading on September 19.

In related developments, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) recently approved options linked to the Grayscale Digital Large Cap Fund and the Cboe Bitcoin U.S. ETF Index.

data.title: Significant Net Inflows Recorded for FBTC, ARKB, and Grayscale BTC
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent monitoring data reveals substantial net inflows into various cryptocurrency funds. FBTC experienced a net inflow of $97.4 million, while ARKB saw $25 million. Additionally, Grayscale BTC reported a net inflow of $10.9 million, and HODL recorded $6.6 million. These figures indicate a notable movement of capital into these funds, reflecting investor interest and activity in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: NBA Star Tristan Thompson to Launch Player Tokenization Platform, Basketball.Fun
data.description: NBA star Tristan Thompson is partnering with Improbable CEO Herman Narula and co-founder Hadi Teherany to launch basketball.fun, a player tokenization platform that tokenizes player value in real time, on Somnia, a Layer 1 blockchain launched earlier this month. Unlike traditional fantasy sports or fan tokens, the platform will tokenize NBA players, whose value fluctuates in real time based on sentiment and performance. Fans will be able to build rosters, predict emerging talent, and earn rewards tied to their predictions and engagement. The app will launch without a native token, distinguishing itself from projects like Socios that rely on token prices. Instead, players will have in-app value that reflects fan sentiment and match results.

data.title: Tether-backed Plasma mainnet beta launches Sept 25
data.description:
The Plasma blockchain, designed just for stablecoins, will launch its mainnet beta on September 25.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/plasma-mainnet-beta-launches-sept-25/

data.title: PayPal's stablecoin PYUSD expands to seven new chains including Aptos, Avalanche, Sei, and Tron via LayerZero
data.description: Cointelegraph reported on the X platform that PayPal's stablecoin, PYUSD, has been expanded to Abstract, Aptos, Avalanche, Ink, Sei, Stable, and Tron via LayerZero's Stargate Hydra. This expansion brings its total coverage to nine blockchains, with the existing version being upgraded to PYUSD 0 for global distribution and interoperability.
